---
title: ""
subtitle: ""
page-layout: custom
section-divs: false
toc: false
css: _assets/index.css  # Link to the page-specific CSS
---

::: {.background-image}
:::

::: {.hero-overlay}
:::

::: {.hero-content}
# Abdelkarim el Ghani

## Statistical Data Analyst | Neuroscientist

### Hi there, welcome to my portfolio.

### Feel free to explore my projects and learn more about me!

::: {.btn-container}
[Explore Projects](projects/index.qmd){.btn}  
[About Me](about.qmd){.btn .btn-secondary}
:::
:::
